[Trines should be considered everywhere] - is applicable
everywhere it is not even necessary to mention that trines
should be considered. Therefore Prasnasara states-
- JlRmi
[Tell without doubt that birth will take place in the sign in
which Gulika or Gulika navamsa is placed]
Note that boldness with which the author of Prasnasara
states about the relation between Lagna and Gulika!
Parsnasara is written by Madhavacharya - one different from
the author of Madhaveeya - lived prior to the author of
Prasnamarga. Being a text better ancient than Prasnamarga
and the representative of an authentic era of astrology these
words are valuable.
The text indicat that at least the sign should match for sure.
Phaladeepika, another authentic text of astrology states-

[The Lagna should be in the sign in which Qulika or Gulika
navamsa is placed or its trines]
